channel.title: BUscience
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUscience, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ancient microbes may have used oxygen 500 million years before it filled Earthâs atmosphere
item.description: Life on Earth may have learned to breathe oxygen long before oxygen filled the skies. MIT researchers traced a key oxygen-processing enzyme back hundr...

item.title: One stem cell generates 14 million tumor-killing NK cells in major cancer breakthrough
item.description: Scientists in China have unveiled a breakthrough way to mass-produce powerful cancer-fighting immune cells in the lab. By engineering early-stage stem...

item.title: Breakthrough CRISPR system could reverse antibiotic resistance crisis
item.description: Antibiotic resistance is racing toward a global crisis, with âsuperbugsâ projected to cause over 10 million deaths annually by 2050. Now, scientists a...

item.title: 125 million-year-old dinosaur with never before seen hollow spikes discovered in China
item.description: A 125-million-year-old dinosaur just rewrote what we thought we knew about prehistoric life. Scientists in China have uncovered an exceptionally prese...

item.title: People who switched to cannabis drinks cut their alcohol use nearly in half
item.description: A new University at Buffalo study suggests cannabis-infused beverages could help some people cut back on alcohol. In a survey of cannabis users, those...

item.title: NSF launches $100M National Quantum and Nanotechnology Research Infrastructure program
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation is investing up to $100 million to establish a nationwide network of open-access research facilities for quantum ...

item.title: Transitioning NCAR-Wyoming Supercomputing Center operations

item.title: NSF announces first AI-ENGAGE awards to modernize global agriculture
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation, in coordination with partner agencies from Australia, India and Japan, today announced the first cohort of award...

item.title: Intent to restructure critical weather science infrastructure
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF) announced today that the agency is reviewing the structure of the research and observational capabilities o...

item.title: NSF and partners invest $9M in AI-focused math education program
